name: Java
description: Installs Java (Temurin/OpenJDK), Maven, Gradle, and Ant.

version.description: The version of Java (Temurin/OpenJDK) to install. Use a major version (e.g. '21') to get the latest patch release.

mavenVersion.description: The version of Maven to install. Use 'none' to skip.

gradleVersion.description: The version of Gradle to install. Use 'none' to skip.

antVersion.description: The version of Ant to install. Use 'none' to skip.

downloadUrl.description: The download URL to use for Java (Temurin) binaries.

versionsUrl.description: The URL to fetch the available Java (Temurin) versions from.

latestUrl.description: The URL to fetch the latest Java (Temurin) release information from.

mavenDownloadUrl.description: The download URL to use for Maven binaries.

mavenVersionsUrl.description: The URL to fetch the available Maven versions from.

gradleDownloadUrl.description: The download URL to use for Gradle binaries.

gradleVersionsUrl.description: The URL to fetch the available Gradle versions from.

antDownloadUrl.description: The download URL to use for Ant binaries.

antVersionsUrl.description: The URL to fetch the available Ant versions from.
